title: Buttery Turkey Ham Keto-Boil
description: A light and buttery keto-boil featuring turkey ham, ideal for hangover recovery with its savory flavors.
instructions: Combine garlic, red pepper flakes, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, thyme, and butter in a small bowl. Mix well until the mixture is smooth.
Place turkey ham on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Pour the prepared seasoning mix over the turkey ham evenly.
Wrap the tray in aluminum foil and place it in the oven for about 30 minutes or until the internal temperature of the turkey ham reaches 145°F (63°C).
Unwrap the tray, remove the thyme sprigs, and let the turkey ham rest for a few minutes before serving.
